title: Lithodora kotschyi
taxonomy: Lithodora kotschyi is a species within the genus Lithodora, which belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The Boraginaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. The genus Lithodora is a small group of flowering plants native to the Mediterranean region. Lithodora kotschyi is classified as a perennial plant, characterized by its blue flowers. The classification of Lithodora kotschyi also includes its binomial nomenclature, with the species being known as Lithodora kotschyi.

intro: Lithodora kotschyi, commonly known as Lithodora, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including hypertension, anxiety, and insomnia, due to its calming and sedative properties. The bioactive constituents of Lithodora kotschyi include alkaloids such as lycorine, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
